title: Oma-Oma

{{Quote|From Oma-Oma, 'cheef of da guds,' came all life on Naboo. All Gungans must strive every day to be worthy of that gift.|A Gungan priest|<ref name="Champions">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Gungan Priest}}</ref>}}
'''Oma-Oma''' was the principal [[Deity/Legends|deity]] in the [[Gungan religion|religion]] of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] was believed to have created all life on the world and to have overseen lesser gods, including [[Dobbis]] and [[Gob Gobba]].

==Biography==
[[File:Gungan_Priest.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Gungan priest believed all Gungans needed to be worthy of Oma-Oma's gift of life.]]
Oma-Oma was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Deity/Legends|deity]]<ref name="French" /> who served as chief of the [[Gud/Legends|guds]] and was worshiped as the principal deity in the [[Gungan religion|religion]] of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="GB" /> She was believed to have created all life on the planet and to have lived with the other guds in the beautiful [[Water/Legends|underwater]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ossorus]]. As her mission was to bring life to Naboo, Oma-Oma also oversaw lesser guds such as [[Dobbis]], goddess of rain, and [[Gob Gobba]], god of fresh water.<ref name="French" />

The god of destruction, [[Mekamok]], lay outside of Oma-Oma's authority and was avoided by his peers while he influenced [[Death/Legends|mortality]] and decay on Naboo. According to legend, Oma-Oma turned the first Gungan [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]], [[Balam]], into the god of battle, taking him to Ossorus to teach the other guds to fight.<ref name="French" /> A [[Unidentified Gungan priest|Gungan priest]] believed that all members of their species had to endeavor to be worthy of Oma-Oma's gift of life.<ref name="Champions" />

==Personality and traits==
Oma-Oma held the title of "[[Boss/Legends|Boss]]" due to her domination of the other guds, although she would only make decisions through consultation with other major deities.<ref name="French" />

==Powers and abilities==
In Gungan legends, Oma-Oma was credited with creating all life on Naboo and was capable of turning the mortal Balam into a god.<ref name="French" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oma-Oma was first mentioned in [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], a reference book written by [[Ben Burtt]] published on [[August 7]], [[2001]].<ref name="Penguin">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/21926/star-wars-galactic-phrase-book-and-travel-guide-by-ben-burtt|text=Star Wars: Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide}}</ref> In the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB" /> released on [[November 11]] of 2001,<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref> Oma-Oma's name could also be randomly chosen as a leader of the Gungan civilization in the standard game mode.<ref name="GB" />
